falsification_conditions.condition: Price increases by 20% above current levels within 14 days
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: A sharp upward move would contradict the HOLD signal and suggest a bullish breakout, invalidating the UNKNOWN verdict.

falsification_conditions.condition: Pattern match similarity drops below 60% to historical bottom_2022_may_luna
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: A significant divergence from the historical pattern would indicate the current scenario is not analogous, falsifying the UNKNOWN verdict.

falsification_conditions.condition: Blowoff score decreases to below 25 within 14 days
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: A drop in blowoff score would suggest reduced market stress, contradicting the current assessment and invalidating the HOLD signal.

doctrine: If you can't list what would prove your call wrong, you don't have a real call.
